title: Most Precious Thing in Life
writer: Travis Ingham, Ethel Hill, Dore Schary
actors: Jean Arthur, Donald Cook, Richard Cromwell
plot: The Most Precious Thing in Life is a 1934 American film directed by Lambert Hillyer and starring Richard Cromwell, Jean Arthur, Donald Cook, Anita Louise, and Mary Forbes. The film tells a story about secret and selfless maternal ...
